prompt: We need to add a new URS for the user profile page. It should state that 'The user must be able to upload a profile picture not exceeding 5MB.' Also, this is critical for the next release, so please set its priority to High.

expected.addRequirement: add a new URS for the user profile page stating 'The user must be able to upload a profile picture not exceeding 5MB.'
expected.prioritizeRequirement: set priority to High for the new URS regarding user profile picture upload size limit.
